They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: The action continues at WPT Borgata. After the final table’s first elimination, five remaining players inch closer and closer to a WPT trophy. Stacks are deep and nobody is backing down.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Veerab Zakarian leads the way of the three remaining at the WPT Borgata final table. Can he hang on to secure the title of WPT Champion or will one of the shorter stacks find a way to battle back? With $674,840 on the line, lots of action is to be expected.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Another name will be added to the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup after the conclusion of the WPT L.A. Poker Classic Main Event, but first, a winner must be decided. Six remain from a field of 490 entrants and all will attempt to continue building a stack with their eye on the top prize of $1 Million Dollars.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Bala Patur leads the way, but former WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas is heating up and is now only behind by a small margin. In the middle of the pack sits 2 time WPT champion James Carroll who will be looking to outlast the two shorter stacks at the table while also giving himself a shot at what would be his third WPT title.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: We are down to four players at the final table of the WPT L.A. Poker Classic. WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas, who finished second in this event in 2019, is still in the hunt for the title. Also in the hunt, two-time WPT Champion James Carroll, chip leader Bala Patur, and Scott Hempel who with this final table finish will record his largest poker cash to date.

programme.desc: Sheriff Blade arrives from Comstock to arrest rancher Del Randall, but the Judge thinks the charges are trumped up. Bean and Taggart put Del in jail for safety while they investigate Blade's connection to suspiciously wealthy Mendenhall. Starring Edgar...

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. When a young man seeking his birthright is accused of murder he makes a run for it. After a posse incurs several more deaths the Judge begins to realize things don'...

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: In this episode, Sharon Bender intends to marry Adam over the objections of wealthy father Dan. When Dan's killing is announced, Adam is jailed and a lynch mob forms. The Judge and Taggart have their doubts wondering if a murder even occurred. Starring...

programme.title: Judge Roy Bean Collection
programme.desc: While attempting to steal land from an Indian tribe, crooked ranchers kill one of the braves. The Judge must move fast to prevent an all-out massacre. Starring Edgar Buchanan, Jack Beutel, and Jackie Laughery.

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone (Bruce Bennett) battles Shawnee warriors as he leads a band of settlers into Kentucky in this frontier potboiler from Albert C. Gannaway Productions. Made at the height of Hollywood's fascination with pioneer days, the film also stars Lon ...

programme.title: The Trail Gang
programme.desc: About to set out on a cattle drive, Ben hires a young drifter named Sam Jackson as one of his drovers.

programme.title: The Abduction
programme.desc: Jennifer is abducted in the hopes her rich dad will pay a $1M ransom. The plan unravels when Della is killed.

programme.title: The Savage
programme.desc: Adam rides up on some Indians wanting to harm a white woman they believed was a mountain spirit.

programme.title: The Mill
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' neighbor Tom Edwards has lived as a paraplegic since an accident involving Ben Cartwright.

programme.title: The Last Viking
programme.desc: Long-lost relative Gunnar arrives at the Ponderosa. Gunnar is the leader of criminals called The Comancheros.

programme.title: Blood on the Arrow
programme.desc: An outlaw survives an Indian raid and rescues a couple's son taken captive.

programme.title: Gunfight at Black Horse Canyon
programme.desc: Jay Squire is an ex-con seeking vengeance on Jim Hardie, who sent him to prison ten years prior.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: After Bill decrees no guns are allowed on Rio Nada's streets, a casino owner puts a hit out on him.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: While serving as Rio Nada's Marshall, Bill tries to learn the identity of a bandit leader.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Bill is forced to kill one of the Dawsons, then must contend with the brothers who want revenge.

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E5 Quantrill and His Raiders
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark travels to the Kansas-Missouri border to track down William Quantrill and his ruthless band of Confederate guerrillas. As the territory is gripped by the violence of the Civil War, Clark must infiltrate the group's inner circle to anticipate their next raid and stop the notorious leader before he can strike again

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E2 Billy the Kid
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark arrives in New Mexico to investigate the legendary outlaw Billy the Kid. Clark must navigate the violent chaos of the Lincoln County War to track down the young gunman, ultimately working to dismantle the Kid’s network and bring the notorious fugitive to justice.

programme.title: The Rifleman:S1 E1 - The Sharpshooter
programme.desc: In the series premiere, widower Lucas McCain and his young son Mark arrive in North Fork, New Mexico, seeking a fresh start. When a local dispute leads to a high-stakes marksmanship contest, Lucas's extraordinary skill with a custom Winchester rifle catches the attention of a local rancher, forcing him to choose between a quiet life and becoming a reluctant protector for the town

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E23 Black Jack Ketchum,
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark tracks the notorious train robber Tom "Black Jack" Ketchum through the Southwest. Clark must navigate treacherous desert terrain and outsmart a desperate, volatile outlaw to stop a string of daring heists and ensure Ketchum answers for his crimes before the law

programme.title: Northwest Passage S1E16 The Counterfeiters
programme.desc: Major Rogers investigates a counterfeiting operation threatening the frontier economy, leading his Rangers on a dangerous mission to track down those responsible

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.

programme.title: The Boss Cowboy
programme.desc: Both Nolan and Ross are losing cattle and Ross' foreman Kerns is the culprit. When Taylor finds a wanted poster of Kerns he goes after him.

programme.title: China 9, Liberty 37 (1978)
programme.desc: In China 9, Liberty 37, Fabio Testi stars as a condemned gunfighter offered freedom if he kills an aging rancher (Warren Oates). But when he meets his intended victim—and falls for the rancher’s restless wife (Jenny Agutter)—the deal turns deadly. Torn between passion, loyalty, and survival, the three are swept into a violent showdown where betrayal and desire collide. With raw emotion, striking landscapes, and gritty shootouts, this revisionist Western blurs the line between love and vengeance.

programme.title: China 9 Liberty 37
programme.desc: The railroad hires a condemned killer to murder an uncooperative rancher but the assassin fails to deliver, prompting the railroad men to go after him instead.

programme.title: Man From Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who don't know their land holds lots of gold, Gene puts a stop to it.
